title: Tiramisu simple end ban
body:
## A simple mod that prevents you from entering the End

---

- The player will be teleported out of the End to the spawn location at coordinates (0, 0).
- The player will receive a message saying that the End has been banned.
- The player will gain the Slow Falling effect.

--- 

AFTER 2.0
The config is available under:



``` /function simple_end_ban:config ```


Eyes will be now removed from end portal frames.

---



![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lzrt3Q1b/images/a78855b512784eedafe898f47c88b5dd9d6fc1a7.gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a78855b512784eedafe898f47c88b5dd9d6fc1a7.gif)
